changes: Added import for useUserRole hook to access isAdmin flag
Added updateEquipment function to the UseEquipmentReturn interface for admin-level equipment field updates (quantity, status, description)
Added isAdmin flag from useUserRole hook to useEquipment component state
Implemented updateEquipment callback function that allows modification of equipment quantity, status, and description fields with proper timestamp tracking
Added admin bypass to visibility filter - admins now see ALL equipment without any unit/personal restrictions (line 258-260)
Updated filter documentation to reflect admin bypass as the first filter rule checked
Added isAdmin to rebuild function dependencies array to ensure filter updates when admin status changes
Exported updateEquipment function in the hook's return object to make it available to components
Added import for useUserRole hook to access isAdmin flag
Added updateEquipment function to the UseEquipmentReturn interface for admin-level equipment field updates (quantity, status, description)
Added isAdmin flag from useUserRole hook to useEquipment component state
Implemented updateEquipment callback function that allows modification of equipment quantity, status, and description fields with proper timestamp tracking
Added admin bypass to visibility filter - admins now see ALL equipment without any unit/personal restrictions (line 258-260)
Updated filter documentation to reflect admin bypass as the first filter rule checked
